creator: silb@silb.no
text:
Created attachment 150812
beets upgrade from 1.3.6 to 1.3.9

* Add options for various new plugins, their dependencies are declared at [1]
  - ImageMagick is optional for the FetchArt and EmbedArt plugins [2][3]
* The project license is declared at [4]
* Depend on www/requests to avoid conflict with audio/py-discogs-client after #196154

[1] https://github.com/sampsyo/beets/blob/v1.3.9/setup.py
[2] http://docs.beets.io/en/v1.3.9/plugins/embedart.html#image-similarity-check
[2] http://docs.beets.io/en/v1.3.9/plugins/fetchart.html#image-resizing
[4] https://github.com/sampsyo/beets/blob/v1.3.9/LICENSE
